mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO score ( student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, semester_id, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.studentId}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.score}, #{item.examType}, #{item.semesterId}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, u.name AS studentName, c.course_name AS courseName, s.score, s.exam_type AS examType, se.semester_name AS semesterName, s.create_time FROM score s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN semester se ON s.semester_id = se.id
SELECT s.id, s.student_id, s.course_id, s.score, s.exam_type, s.semester_id, s.create_time, c.course_name FROM score s LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT c.class_name, s.student_id, s.course_id, s.score, s.exam_type, s.create_time FROM score s JOIN `user` u ON s.student_id = u.id JOIN classes c ON u.class_id = c.id
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM teacher_course tc WHERE tc.teacher_id = #{userId} AND tc.class_id = c.id AND tc.course_id = s.course_id )

SELECT c.class_name AS className, AVG(s.score) AS avgScore, MAX(s.score) AS maxScore, MIN(s.score) AS minScore FROM score s JOIN `user` u ON s.student_id = u.id JOIN classes c ON u.class_id = c.id WHERE u.user_type_enum = 'STUDENT' GROUP BY c.id, c.class_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC
